theme.rationale: Marine tourism booking platform requires a warm, trustworthy, and organic feel, adapting the landing page palette for dense data screens.

hierarchy.table_header: font-sans text-xs uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text-[#64748B] font-medium

layout.sidebar: w-64 bg-[#0B1D2E] text-white hidden md:flex flex-col border-r border-[#E5DCC5]/20
layout.topbar: h-16 bg-white border-b border-[#E5DCC5] flex items-center justify-between px-6 sticky top-0 z-40

components.kpi_card: rounded-2xl border border-[#E5DCC5] bg-white p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

button.primary: bg-[#005F73] text-white hover:bg-[#0A9396] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-[#F0EBE1] text-[#0B1D2E] hover:bg-[#E5DCC5] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors
button.outline: border border-[#005F73] text-[#005F73] hover:bg-[#005F73]/5 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 font-medium transition-colors

components.inputs: rounded-lg border border-[#E5DCC5] bg-[#FAF8F5] px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#005F73] focus:border-transparent outline-none transition-all

table.wrapper: rounded-2xl border border-[#E5DCC5] bg-white overflow-hidden shadow-sm

shadcn_customizations.Card: Use rounded-2xl, border-[#E5DCC5], and shadow-sm instead of default border-border.
shadcn_customizations.Table: Override header font to Outfit, use uppercase with tracking, and set row hover to #F0EBE1/50. Ensure bottom borders are #E5DCC5.
shadcn_customizations.Dialog: Use rounded-2xl, backdrop-blur-sm, bg-white/95 border border-[#E5DCC5]. Headings must use Playfair Display.
shadcn_customizations.Tabs: Use rounded-lg bg-[#F0EBE1], data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#005F73] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm
shadcn_customizations.Badge: Customize variants mapped to brand status colors (Success=Teal, Warning=Sand, Destructive=Coral, Default=Navy)

operator.layout_notes: Focus on daily operations. Large KPI cards for today's bookings. Bento grid for upcoming schedules and recent activity. Data tables for managing products and schedules.

admin.layout_notes: Data-heavy and oversight focused. Use wide tables with multiple filter columns (date ranges, status, operator). Charts for platform revenue.

customer.layout_notes: Lighter, more editorial layout. Highlighting the marine experience. Grid of cards for bookings rather than strict tables. Image-heavy wishlist.

empty_states.description: Boats anchored near lush islands under a blue sky, perfect for 'No Bookings Yet' empty state illustration background.
Aerial view of sandy beach with waves, great for 'Wishlist Empty' imagery.

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case, role-based. Example: data-testid='booking-submit-button'

instructions_to_main_agent: Use standard Tailwind classes, strictly mapped from this JSON.
Implement Shadcn components but override their default borders, radii, and fonts according to shadcn_customizations.
Ensure the sidebar uses Dark Navy (#0B1D2E) to ground the design, while the main content area remains light and earthy.
Use Playfair Display solely for prominent headings (e.g., page titles, modal headers). Use Outfit for all functional UI text.
Do not use generic green/red for status badges; stick to the customized status colors provided in this document.
Never use placeholder image services like via.placeholder.com. ONLY use the provided media_urls.
